items.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Surpasses Market Returns: Some Facts Worth Knowing
items.description: The latest trading day saw Caterpillar (CAT) settling at $402.18, representing a +2% change from its previous close.

items.title: Stock investors should be less diversified now, says portfolio manager
items.description: STORY: "If you own too much of this market, if you're too broadly exposed to an index, or if you own too much of it, you're going to end up owning a lot of bad stuff with the few good names that are out there," said Mulberry.He encourages buying high-growth AI stocks and larger, established names like JP Morgan, Bank of America and Caterpillar."Things are definitely starting to wobble in certain parts of this market," he added. "It's going to be important to pay attention to those higher quality things like low levels of debt and not just the rate of growth at any one point in time."
